summary: Iteration 6 (Compass Astro rebrand + Emergent Google Auth + user-scoped data + auto-name + per-message book scoping) — Backend 19/19 pytest passing in 91s (auth Bearer, 401 without, /profile+/chart+/transits+/threads+/books+/chat all scoped per user_id, seed vs custom books with DELETE seed→400, per-message scope event before deltas, follow-up does NOT emit scope, auto-name changed 'Chat 1'→short 2-5 word title within seconds, manual rename+404 on missing, chat SSE citations+deltas+done+<LOGIC>, user B cannot read/rename/delete user A's threads, cross-user history returns 404). Frontend UI drive verified via Playwright with seeded session cookie: (1) Landing (data-testid=landing-page) renders when unauthenticated with 'Compass Astro' + tagline 'Ancient wisdom, clear direction' + 'Continue with Google' button (data-testid=google-signin-btn); clicking sets window.location.href to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=<origin>/dashboard. (2) /dashboard, /chat, /library all redirect to Landing when unauthenticated; load correctly with session_token cookie. (3) Sidebar shows 'Compass Astro' branding + user name + Sign out; collapse persists to localStorage['jyotish_sidebar_collapsed']='1'. (4) Library shows 12 seed books with 'Seed' badge + Lock icon + 'Seed corpus (built-in, locked)' label; uploads section hidden until upload; upload PDF → 'Yours' badge + delete-book-<id> testid + delete-book-confirm dialog → book removed. (5) Chat: new-thread-btn creates ?t=<id>, chat-input+chat-send-btn stream a real 500+ char markdown reply via SSE with citations chips, Why? opens logic-panel Sheet with content; when SSE stream is allowed to complete fully, auto-name renames the UI-created thread from 'Chat N' to a real title (verified: 'Astrology Career Financial Guidance', 'Career Path Interpretation'). (6) Rebrand: no 'Jyotish AI' or 'Vedic Counsel' string on Landing, Dashboard, Chat, Library, or sidebar. REGRESSION: kundali-chart, kundali-chart-d9, house-lords-card, current-dasha (MD+AD), transits-card, yogas-card all render on Dashboard. Three genuine issues found (see below). unverified: page <title> is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' not 'Compass Astro' (emergent-main.js overrides).

minor.issue: Assistant message may NOT persist and auto-name task never fires if the client disconnects before the final `yield event: done`. Server-side generator gets cancelled at `await db.messages.insert_one(...)` on client-disconnect. Reproduced by taking a screenshot / navigating mid-stream. Recommendation: use asyncio.shield() around the persist+auto-name block, or run persistence BEFORE the final yield in a way that survives cancellation. Also fixes premature 'Chat 2' thread that never got renamed nor got its assistant message saved.

When the scope narrows the retrieval pool to a very small set (e.g. Phaladeepika has only 2 seed chunks), BM25 IDF collapses to 0 for query terms that appear in ALL scoped chunks, so search_for_user returns []. Verified: search_for_user(db, uid, 'career', book_names={'Phaladeepika (Mantreswara)'}) → []. Result: scoped chat answers show NO citations even though scope is applied. Recommendation: apply a floor to BM25 idf, or fall back to a substring match, or return top-K without the `score > 0` filter when the pool is tiny.

ui_bugs.issue: streaming state does NOT reset after the SSE stream completes — send-btn remained disabled and 'reading the stars…' spinner visible for 90s+ AFTER the answer was fully rendered and assistant message persisted. reader.read() while-loop never sees {done:true}. Suggests either a keep-alive on the response or a lingering chunk not being flushed. User cannot send a follow-up until they refresh the page.

Page <title> is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' at runtime instead of 'Compass Astro'. index.html source has <title>Compass Astro</title> but the injected https://assets.emergent.sh/scripts/emergent-main.js overrides it. Add a client-side title guard (useEffect setting document.title='Compass Astro' on Landing + AppShell), or a react-helmet.

Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent — carry-over from prior iterations (rename dialog, delete dialog, logic-panel Sheet). Non-blocking accessibility warning.

action_items: Fix Chat.jsx streaming-state stuck bug: send-btn / spinner never resets even after SSE stream completes and assistant message is persisted. Likely reader.read() never sees {done:true} — investigate response-close behavior (StreamingResponse closing, chunked transfer buffering, or ensure server explicitly signals EOF).

Guard chat message persistence against client-disconnect cancellation. Between the last delta yield and the final `yield event: done`, wrap `db.messages.insert_one(...)` + `db.threads.update_one(...)` + `asyncio.create_task(_auto_name_thread(...))` in `asyncio.shield()` OR emit `event: done` FIRST then persist (client already has the reply). Otherwise the answer + auto-name are lost when the user navigates away or closes the tab mid-stream.

Fix BM25 empty-result on tiny scoped pools in knowledge.search_for_user — either drop the `score > 0` filter when book_names is provided, or return top-K by raw ordering. Currently, scoped queries against small seed books (Phaladeepika 2 chunks, Saravali 2 chunks, etc.) return ZERO citations so the LLM has no grounding for the scoped answer.
Add document.title='Compass Astro' at runtime in App.js/Landing.jsx to override the platform-injected <title>. index.html value is overwritten by emergent-main.js.
(Low priority) Add aria-describedby / Description on AlertDialogContent + SheetContent to clear the Radix accessibility console warning.
(Low priority) Cleanup 'ui-thread-a' seeded General thread once done using UI_userA session — currently persistent to keep testing state stable across iterations.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py chat_stream(): the persistence + auto-name scheduling happen AFTER the async-for-delta loop but BEFORE `yield event: done`. Any client disconnect during this window causes `await db.messages.insert_one(...)` to raise CancelledError and drop the assistant reply + auto-name. Wrap in asyncio.shield() or persist BEFORE yielding done (safer: emit done first, then persist in a shielded block).
server.py chat_stream(): `import asyncio` is inline inside a function — hoist to top-level (cosmetic).

knowledge.py search_for_user(): the `if scores[i] > 0` filter combined with rank_bm25's collapsing IDF on tiny pools yields empty citations for per-message-scoped queries. Either remove the filter when book_names is given, use a floor > -inf, or blend keyword-substring fallback.

server.py detect_book_scope() regex uses `\b(from|as per|according to|per|in|using|based on|only from|from the)\b\s+([A-Za-z][^,.?!\n]{2,80})` — the trigger `in` is very common English ('shifts in my career', 'in general') and can accidentally scope to a book. Consider tightening to `only from`, `as per`, `according to`, `from the book`, and `@bookname`.

AppShell.jsx createThread names the new thread `Chat ${threads.length + 1}` — if the user has already renamed prior threads (which they will, once auto-name fires), the count is based on ALL threads and can produce misleading names. Prefer 'New chat' (which also matches the auto-name regex).
AppShell.jsx thread-menu still uses opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 — keyboard/touch users still can't reach the rename/delete menu (carry-over).

server.py logout only deletes the session that matches the cookie — Bearer-token clients cannot log out because the endpoint doesn't inspect Authorization. Consider mirroring get_current_user's dual-source token lookup.
Chat.jsx: uploaded attachment previews use URL.createObjectURL(f) but never call URL.revokeObjectURL — minor memory leak on repeated attachments.

backend_test.py compatibility with old iteration_5 fixtures / seed profile id `96eb44c1-...` — replaced with per-user seed via mongosh + Bearer. Old TestChatVision/TestAttachments removed from suite (out of scope for iter-6); can be re-added under the new user-scoped model if needed.

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 pytest passed in 91s) — auth 401 gates, /me with Bearer, /profile CRUD scoped, /profile/chart+ /transits shape, seed vs custom books (12 seed / DELETE seed→400 / upload+search+delete custom), user-B isolation on threads+profile+books+history, manual rename+404, auto-name Chat-1→short title within 20s, per-message book scoping emits scope event before deltas and does NOT persist to follow-up, chat SSE citations+deltas+done+LOGIC block, history persistence.
success_rate.frontend: ~85% — All required UI features verified: Landing (branding+tagline+Google btn+correct sign-in redirect URL), Protected redirects, Dashboard with Kundali D1+D9+house-lords+current-dasha+transits+yogas, Sidebar 'Compass Astro' + collapse persistence, Library seed/custom sections + upload+delete flow, Chat SSE stream + Why?+logic-panel, no old brand strings. Failing/degraded: (a) send-btn spinner never resets after stream completes (medium), (b) document.title overridden by platform script (low), (c) attempting to click Why? mid-stream can drop the assistant reply (see backend action item #2).

test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh: UI_userA (session_token='UI_tokenA', profile 'Arjuna' 1990-05-15 Varanasi, thread 'ui-thread-a' name=General). Pytest workers seed their own per-run TEST_<gwX>_... users and self-clean at teardown.
seed_data_creation: MongoDB users: UI_userA + session UI_tokenA + profile 'ui-profile-a' + thread 'ui-thread-a' persist for future testing. Pytest workers create/clean their own TEST_<worker>_... users (isolated per worker to avoid xdist cross-worker cleanup interference). PDF fixture at /app/test_fixtures/test.pdf (1158 bytes, generated with fpdf2). PNG fixture at /app/test_fixtures/attachment.png (1589 bytes, from iter-5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 auth + rebrand + auto-name + per-message scoping are functionally verified end-to-end. Backend suite is /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (19 tests, ~91s under -n 2 loadscope). Uses worker-unique TEST_<gw>_... prefixes to avoid xdist cross-worker cleanup races — DO NOT revert to the shared regex-based cleanup. UI test user: UI_userA / cookie 'session_token=UI_tokenA' (see /app/auth_testing.md). Known bugs to prioritize: (1) Chat.jsx streaming state stuck true after stream completes → send-btn permanently disabled, user has to reload page to send follow-up. (2) chat_stream persistence gets cancelled if client disconnects between last delta and 'done' event — assistant message + auto-name silently dropped. Fix with asyncio.shield around insert_one+update+create_task, OR emit 'done' first then persist. (3) knowledge.search_for_user returns [] when book_names narrows the pool to 2-3 chunks because BM25 IDF collapses — remove or floor the `score > 0` filter for scoped queries. (4) index.html <title>Compass Astro</title> is being overwritten at runtime by https://assets.emergent.sh/scripts/emergent-main.js — need react-helmet or document.title effect. Test-ids in use match iter-5 doc plus new: landing-page, google-signin-btn, signin-header-btn, delete-book-<id>, delete-book-confirm, upload-input, upload-btn, custom-book-<i>, seed-book-<i>, library-search-input, library-search-btn, search-results, geocode-result, onboarding-page, onboarding-submit-btn.
rca of the issue: Bug #1 (streaming stuck) — Chat.jsx reader.read() while(true) loop breaks only on `{done: true}`. If server keeps the response open (chunked transfer buffering, or forgets to close after final yield), the loop hangs forever and setStreaming(false) in finally never runs. Root cause likely: FastAPI StreamingResponse holds the connection open for keep-alive AFTER the async generator returns. Recommend explicit Connection: close header on the SSE response, or a client-side timeout that force-completes when the last `done` event is received. Bug #2 (persistence dropped on disconnect) — Chat.jsx immediately re-renders when new messages arrive, but the SSE reader keeps running. If user clicks Why?/navigates/closes tab BEFORE server hits `yield event: done`, Starlette cancels the async generator at its next await (which is `await db.messages.insert_one(...)`). CancelledError propagates, insert never happens. Fix: wrap the tail-end persistence + auto-name in `asyncio.shield()`, or emit `done` FIRST then persist under shield. Bug #3 (BM25 zero-scores) — rank_bm25's IDF formula returns near-zero (or clamped to 0 by internal `max(0, ...)` epsilon) when N-n is small; for a pool of 2 both containing the same term this collapses. Filter `if scores[i] > 0` then drops all. Recommend either dropping the >0 filter (return top-K regardless), or using a soft floor like `score if score > -1 else 0`, or adding a substring fallback in the tiny-pool case.
